arts.ttl: 'My information is': Craig Hope issues big Alexander Isak update ahead of Newcastle vs Fulham
arts.sum: Craig Hope has issued a big injury update on Alexander Isak ahead of Newcastle United vs Fulham.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United squad revealed for Fulham with Eddie Howe facing big decision
arts.sum: Gordon took up a central role in the second half against Wolves and, if Isak is ruled out today, is likely to start through the middle again at Craven Cottage, with Harvey Barnes and Jacob Murphy on the flanks. The debate in the full-back positions continues, with Tino Livramento and Lewis Hall starting at Wolves, although Kieran Trippier replaced the former in the second half.

arts.ttl: Is Fulham vs Newcastle United on TV, what time is kick-off and how can I stream it?
arts.sum: TNT Sports are showing the West Ham vs Chelsea game, while Sky Sports will broadcast tonight's match between Crystal Palace and Manchester United. The game kicks off at 3pm today, Saturday, September 21, at Craven Cottage, Fulham.

arts.ttl: Fulham v Newcastle: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Fulham v Newcastle: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Silva wants Fulham to ‘write a different story’ against Newcastle
arts.sum: Fulham news. The post Silva wants Fulham to ‘write a different story’ against Newcastle appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United are already two games away from double Joelinton nightmare scenario
arts.sum: Joelinton, who is now already halfway to matching his yellow card tally from last season despite playing 16 matches less, is a bit of a booking fiend. He has managed 39 yellow cards in his five-and-a-bit year spell at Newcastle, getting at least five in all but one of his full seasons in Europe as a player.

arts.ttl: Is Alexander Isak fit to start for Newcastle vs Fulham? Injury latest and FPL update
arts.sum: It's been a bit of a slow start to the current campaign for Isak, with one goal and one assist in his first four Premier League games, having started every top-flight fixture so far this season. However, the Magpies' striker is a doubt for the clash with Fulham this weekend having injured himself on international duty

arts.ttl: Harvey Barnes told what he must do to start for Newcastle United after Wolves wonder goal
arts.sum: Former Crystal Palace and Birmingham City striker Clinton Morrison believes Harvey Barnes should be starting for Newcastle United after his wonder goal against Wolves. The 26-year-old has played just 158 minutes in the top flight this season, starting just one Premier League fixture - the 2-1 win over Tottenham Hotspur where he scored the opening goal of the game.

arts.ttl: Inside Man City's FFP charges hearing as 'bombshell moments' predicted amid Newcastle concern
arts.sum: Manchester City fans have been cautioned not to hold their breath for extensive details emerging from the ongoing Premier League hearing in London. Yet, former Everton CEO Keith Wyness, in conversation with Football Insider, suggested that further information will be scarce: "The secret location was leaked, there were photographs of the lawyers going in and the lead lawyer, David Pannick, is reportedly on £5,000 per-hour.
